sm.$description: Micro-interactions like focus rings and state changes

md.$description: Standard transitions like menus and popovers

lg.$description: Deliberate animations like slides and reveals

xl.$description: Extended animations like complex or multi-step transitions

subtle.$description: Nearly imperceptible easing for hover, color, and background transitions

balanced.$description: General-purpose easing for on-screen movement like resizing, morphing, and layout shifts

expressive.$description: Noticeable easing for enter/exit and spatial transitions like menus, popovers, dialogs, and drawers
